content: [P1-1] Install Python deps (google-genai, google-auth, google-api-python-client, psycopg2-binary, sqlalchemy) and update pyproject.toml metadata
[P1-2] Build backend: Gmail OAuth flow, Gmail API service, AI classifier with Gemini, DB schema/migrations, API routes
[P1-3] Build frontend: Gmail connection onboarding, scan dashboard, category breakdown charts, review queue, run history
[P1-4] Update project metadata (package.json, index.html title) and test end-to-end
